titles.title: The Lord Is by My Side

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know my Shepherd gives me peace The Lord is by my side For every day, He walks with me The Lord is by my side

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The Lord is by my side Forever by my side His Hope, His strength, His peace is mine The Lord is by my side

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I know my Shepherd gives me strength The Lord is by my side For I am small, and He is great The Lord is by my side

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I know my Shepherd gives me hope The Lord is by my side For He will lead me safely home The Lord is by my side

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And when I look back, I will surely see Your goodness and love have followed me For when I look, I will surely see My Shepherd has laid down His life for me
